title: 10 health benefits of Nerium oleander (oleander)
intro: Nerium oleander has health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant and flavonoid properties. The plant's bioactive compounds have been shown to lower cholesterol levels, blood pressure, and triglycerides, which can reduce the risk of heart disease and stroke. For example, oleander extracts have been used to treat patients with hypertension, resulting in improved symptoms and quality of life. Additionally, its antioxidant properties may help alleviate symptoms of depression and anxiety.
